updateNote: Day 29 refresh (2:47 AM PDT): Houthis fire first missile at Israel (intercepted) — 5th front opens; Iran strikes Kuwait Airport radar, Salalah Port, UAE industrial zone (simultaneous 3-nation Gulf attack); Prince Sultan confirmed 12 US troops wounded (2 critical), E-3 AWACS damaged; Pakistan hosts Islamabad peace summit with Saudi/Turkey/Egypt FMs; Trump calls NATO 'paper tiger'; Rubio: 'weeks not months'; RUSI warns interceptor stocks at critical lows; Brent $112.57 (war high); 8th nation (Thailand) reaches Hormuz transit deal; Hormuz blockade Day 26.
